pattern: Cyclical-threshold noisy-data pretraining + RAN upstream-noise rectify + Continual character-noise pretraining + RobustFormer + Progressive layer dropping curriculum

honest_audit.borderline_notes: BESSEMER-BLAST staged structured noise has multi-cluster overlap with prior pretraining-noise literature. The specific covariance-targeted reactivity-ordered injection is more novel than the others, but the umbrella concept (staged noise during pretraining) is well-covered.
